title: ProSound Elite ANC Wireless Earbuds - Bluetooth 5.3 with Active Noise Cancellation
description:
Experience premium sound quality with the ProSound Elite ANC Wireless Earbuds. Featuring advanced Bluetooth 5.3 technology and hybrid active noise cancellation, these earbuds deliver crystal-clear audio whether you're commuting, working out, or relaxing at home.

The ergonomic design ensures a comfortable fit for extended listening sessions, while the IPX5 water resistance makes them perfect for workouts. With up to 8 hours of playtime (32 hours with the charging case), you'll have music all day long.

Key Features:
• Hybrid Active Noise Cancellation
• Bluetooth 5.3 with multipoint connection
• 8 hours playtime + 24 hours with case
• IPX5 water and sweat resistant
• Touch controls & voice assistant support
• Premium 10mm dynamic drivers
reviews: Amazing noise cancellation for the price! Blocks out my noisy office perfectly.
Sound quality is excellent - rich bass and clear highs. Very impressed.
Comfortable fit, I can wear these for hours without any discomfort.
Battery life is as advertised. Easily lasts my full workday.
The touch controls take some getting used to, but work well once you learn them.
Had some connectivity issues initially, but firmware update fixed everything.
Great value compared to premium brands. 90% of the quality at half the price.
Love the transparency mode - can hear announcements without removing earbuds.
Case is compact and charges quickly. USB-C is a nice touch.
Mic quality for calls could be better in windy conditions.
